title: Let's Make a Game!
description: The first step toward creating your own game!

scenes.speech: Wouldn't it be cool to build your own game? Let's try it together!
scenes.title: Welcome to Game Development!

scenes.speech: Games run in a loop. They keep checking, updating, and drawing the screen!
scenes.title: What Is a Game Loop?
scenes.content: A game keeps repeating input, update, and draw. That loop keeps everything alive.

scenes.speech: Unity is a great tool for starting game development!
scenes.title: Build Games with Unity
scenes.content: You can place objects visually and also learn programming while making games.

scenes.speech: Game development is exciting. Keep building!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
